text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Feeding off the infinite wave of feels<n>that was my
run of senior-year spring<n>G1 races, I have
achieved a super<n>evolution. It's time to take on
Opera O<n>and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna race them at a course where<n>they can be
at the top of their game!<n>That means our only
choice is to run a<n>medium-distance race on turf!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Next up is the autumn Tenno Sho!<n>Bring it on.
